OpenAI.summary: OpenAI model family supporting text-to-image, image-to-video, text-to-video, and text generation.

Hunyuan3D.summary: Tencent's 3D generation model supporting text-to-3D and image-to-3D mesh creation.

Tripo.summary: 3D model generation from text or image, supporting various output formats.

Recraft.summary: Sharp, detailed images from Recraft with Standard and Pro modes.
strengths: Type: Quality

ByteDance.summary: ByteDance's multi-modal model family for high-resolution image and video generation, editing, and brand design. Seedream models handle text-to-image and image editing at up to 2K resolution, while Seedance models specialize in video generation and first-last frame interpolation.
strengths: High-resolution image generation (2K)
Versatile image editing and relighting
Video generation with first/last frame control
Optimized for brand design and product mockups

Seedance 2.0.summary: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's frontier video generation model that produces cinematic motion with optional synchronized audio. It supports text-to-video, reference-to-video (using images, video, or audio tags), and first-last-frame interpolation for controlled sequences. A faster variant (Seedance 2.0 Fast) offers the same capabilities at reduced inference time.
strengths: Cinematic motion quality with smooth, film-like camera movement
Optional synchronized audio generation alongside video output
Reference-guided generation using tagged images, video clips, or audio cues
First-last-frame control for precise scene interpolation
Real human identity verification for consistent character generation
Fast variant (Seedance 2.0 Fast) with reduced latency for real-time workflows

Seedance.summary: Latest medium quality model from ByteDance with audio generation and end frame support.
strengths: Type: Quality
Seedance 1.5 Pro (video): Latest medium quality model from ByteDance with audio generation and end frame support.
Seedance Pro (video): Fast, high-quality model from ByteDance.
Seedance Pro Fast (video): Fast and cheap model. Up to 12 seconds.

Seedream.summary: Latest high-quality model from ByteDance with flexible resolution support
strengths: Type: Quality

Vidu Q2.summary: High-quality model with reference images support.
strengths: Type: Quality
Type: Quality

HiDream.summary: Text-to-image diffusion model with image editing support.

Qwen-Image.summary: Semi-realistic model with great text generation and prompt adherence. Capable of following long and highly detailed prompts.
strengths: Type: Quality

Qwen-Image-Edit.summary: Advanced image editing model with 3D, relighting, style transfer, and ControlNet support.

Z-Image-Turbo.summary: Fast text-to-image with batch generation, ControlNet, and video generation support.

ElevenLabs.summary: Audio generation with text-to-speech, voice cloning, lip sync, sound effects, and voice isolation.

ACE-Step.summary: ACE-Step is a family of audio and music generation models capable of producing high-quality music, instrumentals, and audio from text prompts. It includes variants optimized for speed (Turbo) and quality (SFT), and also supports AI-driven lyric song generation with optional external LLM integration.
strengths: Fast music generation with Turbo variant
High-quality audio output with SFT variant
Supports both instrumental and lyrical music creation
Advanced audio editing capabilities (M2M editing)
Multiple model size options (e.g., 4B LLM-based) for flexibility

Stable Audio.summary: Audio generation from text prompts, supporting audio-to-audio transformations.

Topaz.summary: AI image and video upscaling with detail enhancement.

Magnific.summary: Image enhancement and upscaling with portrait, relighting, and style reference features.

BRIA.summary: BRIA is an API-based model specialized in image and video editing tasks, particularly background removal, outpainting, and retouching. It excels at automating precision edits like extracting subjects from videos with transparent backgrounds or expanding image boundaries seamlessly. The FIBO variant supports structured image editing guided by text instructions.
strengths: Accurate background removal for both images and videos with transparency support
Seamless outpainting and expansion of image boundaries
Efficient video processing including green screen conversion and background replacement
Text-driven image editing with structured instructions via FIBO model option
Fast API-driven workflows suitable for batch or real-time applications

Seedream 4.5.summary: Quality 4K model optimized for vibrant photorealism.
strengths: Type: Quality

Luma UNI-1.summary: Luma UNI-1 reasons through prompts before generating and supports optional visual references.
strengths: Type: Intelligent

Kling o1.summary: Intelligent video model that thinks before generating. Supports image, element, and video references for precise creative control.
strengths: Type: Quality

Luma.summary: Older medium model with natural motion from Luma Labs.
strengths: Type: Legacy

SeedVR2.summary: ByteDance's fast video upscaler for quick video enhancement up to 4K resolution.

Kling o3.summary: Advanced reasoning video model (1080p). Supports image, element, and video references for precise creative control.
strengths: Type: Intelligent
Kling o3 Pro (video): Advanced reasoning video model (1080p). Supports image, element, and video references for precise creative control.
Kling o3 (video): Advanced reasoning video model (720p). Supports image, element, and video references for precise creative control.

Anima.summary: Anima is a specialized model designed for generating high-quality anime and illustration-style images from text prompts. It excels at producing vibrant, detailed artwork that closely follows the provided descriptions, making it ideal for artists and creators seeking anime-themed visuals.
strengths: Exceptional quality of anime and illustration outputs
Accurate adherence to text prompts for style and composition
Vibrant color palettes and fine linework typical of anime art
Consistent character and scene generation

BiRefNet.summary: BiRefNet is a high-precision background removal model that excels at image matting, producing clean cutouts with fine detail preservation. It is widely used for tasks like removing backgrounds from portraits, products, and complex scenes, delivering smooth edges and transparent overlays.
strengths: High-precision matting with fine detail retention (e.g., hair, fur)
Clean background removal for diverse subjects (people, objects, animals)
Handles complex boundaries and semi-transparent regions
Suitable for both professional photo editing and automated workflows

Boogu.summary: Comfy-Org image model family: Boogu Turbo is a distilled 10B-parameter text-to-image pipeline (4 steps, photorealistic); Boogu image 0.1 Edit supports instruction-driven image editing.
strengths: Fast photorealistic text-to-image in few steps
Strong prompt adherence and bilingual text rendering
Instruction-based image edit with comparison output

Capybara.summary: Capybara is a versatile vision-language model capable of generating and editing both images and videos. It can create images from text descriptions, animate reference images into videos, and perform instruction-based editing on images and videos. The model supports a range of tasks including text-to-image, image-to-video, and image/video editing.
strengths: Handles both image and video generation/editing
Supports text-guided editing of images and videos
Animates static images into videos with motion prompts
Offers multiple workflow categories (Image, Video) with moderate usage
Accepts combined image and text inputs for precise control

Chatter Box.summary: Chatter Box is a talking head and lip-sync model that also excels at voice cloning and text-to-speech generation. It supports multilingual TTS, multi-speaker conversations, and audio conversion, making it ideal for creating synthetic speech with cloned voices.
strengths: High-quality voice cloning with minimal reference audio
Multilingual text-to-speech support
Multi-speaker dialog generation with distinct cloned voices
Audio-to-audio voice conversion
Talking head and lip-sync capabilities

Chroma.summary: Chroma is an advanced image generation and editing model that excels at text-to-image creation with a specialty in chroma key compositing. It produces high-quality visuals suitable for seamless integration into other projects via green screen techniques.
strengths: Produces vivid, high-quality images from text prompts
Optimized for chroma key (green screen) compositing workflows
Enables efficient creation of assets for video and graphic design
Offers a variant (Chroma1 Radiance) for enhanced radiance and lighting
capabilities: image generation with green screen backgrounds

Claude.summary: Anthropic's LLM for prompt enhancement and text reasoning in workflows.

DWPose.summary: Pose estimation model for extracting skeleton keypoints from images.

FILM.summary: Frame interpolation model for smooth slow-motion and frame rate conversion.

FireRed Image Edit 1.1.summary: Image editing model supporting inpainting and local edits.

FlashVSR.summary: Fast video super-resolution and restoration model.

Gemma 4.summary: Google's lightweight open LLM for text generation and prompt enhancement.

HappyHorse 1.0.summary: HappyHorse generates synchronized audio-video clips from text, image references, or a source video edit instruction.
strengths: Type: Intelligent

HappyHorse 1.1.summary: HappyHorse 1.1 generates short videos with synchronized dialogue, sound effects, and music from text, a first frame, or reference images.
strengths: Native audio-video generation in one pass
Character and scene consistency from reference images
Suited to ads, episodic shorts, and game cutscenes

HitPaw.summary: HitPaw video enhancement and editing model.

HuMo.summary: Human motion generation and transfer model.

Hunyuan Video.summary: Tencent's text-to-video and image-to-video generation model.

IP Adapter.summary: Image prompt adapter for style and content reference in image generation.

Ideogram 3.0: Highly aesthetic, general-purpose model. Excels at flat and graphic styles.

Flux.1 Krea: Distilled and open sourced version of Krea 1. Better at text rendering and anatomy.

OpenRouter.summary: OpenRouter model router for accessing multiple LLMs.

PiD.summary: Personal image dataset model for custom image generation.

PixelDiT.summary: Diffusion transformer model for high-quality image generation.

Qwen 3.0.summary: Alibaba's advanced LLM for text reasoning and prompt enhancement.

Qwen Image Edit 2511.summary: Qwen image editing model from November 2025 with enhanced inpainting.

Stability.summary: Stability AI's image generation platform model.

TripoSplat.summary: Tripo's 3D Gaussian splatting model for 3D reconstruction.

VOID.summary: Video object inpainting and removal model.

Veo.summary: Best video model. Highest-quality frontier model with audio and reference images.

Veo 3.1 (video): Best video model. Highest-quality frontier model with audio and reference images.
Veo 3 Fast (video): Older, faster and more affordable version of the leading Veo 3 model with audio.
Veo 3 (video): Older version of the highest-quality frontier model Veo 3.1.

Veo 3.1 Lite (video): Faster and more affordable version of the powerful Veo 3.1 model.

Wan ATI.summary: Wan Automatic Ticketing Interface for video generation with text prompts.

Wan2.1 SCAIL.summary: Wan2.1 with SCAIL character replacement for video editing.

Wan2.7.summary: Medium-quality model from Alibaba with improved quality and multi-shot support.

Wan 2.6 (video): Medium-quality model from Alibaba with improved quality and multi-shot support.

Z-Image.summary: Cheapest model. Medium quality photorealism at a budget. Realistic textures, weak diversity.
strengths: Type: Fast

wan2.2 Animate.summary: Wan2.2 animation and video editing model.

Quiver.summary: Text-to-SVG and image-to-SVG vector generation model for scalable graphics.

Depth Anything v2.summary: Monocular depth estimation model for generating relative depth maps from single images and videos.

Bernini-R.summary: Bernini-R is a text-driven image and video editing model that modifies visual content based on natural language prompts. It excels at localized edits and style changes in both still images and video frames, though outputs are limited to single images even for video tasks.
strengths: Accurate text-guided edits with semantic coherence
Handles both image and video editing workflows
Produces high-quality edited frames from videos
Efficient for rapid iteration on visual content

ChronoEdit.summary: ChronoEdit is a model designed for temporal video editing tasks, enabling users to modify video content with coherent changes across frames. It specializes in maintaining consistency when altering objects, backgrounds, or style over time, and can be used for video inpainting, style transfer, and frame interpolation.
strengths: Temporal consistency
Video inpainting and object removal
Frame interpolation
Style transfer over time
Efficient video editing workflows
